work-kinectrics.title: AI / Software Developer Intern at Kinectrics
work-kinectrics.content:
## Responsibilities

- Developed anomaly detection models using LSTM and Transformer-based (TranAD) architectures for industrial systems.
- Built and trained models using Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch.
- Designed a Streamlit dashboard for real-time anomaly visualization.
- Collaborated with a team to deliver end-to-end AI solutions.

work-infolib.title: IT / Software Intern at Infolib
work-infolib.content:
## Responsibilities

- Worked with ERP and CRM systems to support business operations and client requests.
- Collaborated with stakeholders to gather requirements and improve system workflows.
- Provided technical support and contributed to task coordination within the intern team.

work-nodo.title: Server at Nodo Hillcrest
work-nodo.content:
## Responsibilities

- Delivered high-quality service to 200+ customers per shift in a fast-paced environment.
- Managed order flow and trained new staff, ensuring smooth operations.
